tion How do I reserve a DOP Center Room or 540 A/B Cory? Christopher Brooks , 18 Feb 2010 Last updated: 5 Sep 2017 Note: Starting in February, 2013, to reserve 540A/B, you must use bCal. See Cory and Soda Hall Room Reservations . 540A/B is managed by

Soda Hall Room Reservations . 540A/B is managed by the EECS Department, not by the DOP Center. 529, 540R and 540X Room Reservation Procedure We use a private DOP Center calendar to schedule 529, 540R and 540X Rooms in the DOP Center 529 Library, note

and 540X Rooms in the DOP Center 529 Library, note that DOP faculty have priority for 529. To reserve 529, use the DOP Center Calendar and be sure to mention 529 Library . (FIXME: How many people can it hold?): 545R Video Conference Room, note that D

it hold?): 545R Video Conference Room, note that DOP faculty have priority for 545R. To reserve 545R, use the DOP Center Calendar and be sure to mention 545R . Note that the conference phone in 545R requires a phone code to dial 800 numbers. DOP C
